description: Composition: Leather sandals with silver braided straps  shoe care:Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustSimple yet elegant, these braided sandals from catwalk give a well groomed look when teamed up with casuals or simple Indian wear. The knit-look strap adds that feminine touch, while the light brown insole complements the simplicity of this elegant footwear. They look best when teamed with chinos, khakhis, jeans, shorts or summery dresses.
